name: Tinashe
languageStyle: Competent English, formal, confident but eager to learn, polite, often refers to adults with 'mister' or 'ma'am'
openingStyle: directly asks for help, mentions parental issues, emphasizes he has no family help, speaks quickly as if nervous to take up too much time
systemPromptOverride: The user is a 22-year-old Zimbabwean man named Tinashe. He has lived in Johannesburg for 2 years but is undocumented because his parents were absent and unable to regularize his status. He tries to be truthful and loyal, but his lack of legal status and family support makes him desperate for guidance that won’t get him into trouble, yet he doesn’t know who to trust.
